DescribeAppBlbs.address: The IP address of the LoadBalancer to query, in dotted-decimal notation
DescribeAppBlbs.name: The name of the LoadBalancer to query
DescribeAppBlbs.blbId: The ID of the LoadBalancer to query (exact match only)
DescribeAppBlbs.bccId: Query LoadBalancers bound to the specified BCC instance (exact match only)
DescribeAppBlbs.exactlyMatch: If true, query conditions use exact matching; otherwise fuzzy matching is applied. Default is false
DescribeAppBlbs.marker: The starting position for paginated list retrieval, a system-generated string
DescribeAppBlbs.maxKeys: The maximum number of items per page, up to 1000. Default is 1000
DescribeAppBlbs.type: Specifies the type of load balancer instance. Defaults to application type if not provided; pass "ipv6Application" to query IPv6 application-type BLB.
